html:
Exclusive to:

Tab Icon.

The Plantholders Tab is a crafting category exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found under the Renovate Tab. All Plantholders can be rotated in multiple directions.

Craftable Items and Structures

The following items and structures can be acquired in the Plantholders Tab:

Name Recipe Description Spawn Code

Basic Plantholder		 ×6 "Basic home decor." deco_plantholder_basic

WIP Plantholder		 ×6 "Ready for unwrapping." deco_plantholder_wip

Marble Plantholder		 ×6 "Chiseled elegance." deco_plantholder_marble

Bonsai Plantholder		 ×6 "Add some zen." deco_plantholder_bonsai

Dishgarden Plantholder		 ×6 "Succulent." deco_plantholder_dishgarden

Philodendron Plantholder		 ×6 "Green and leafy." deco_plantholder_philodendron

Orchid Plantholder		 ×6 "Fragrant." deco_plantholder_orchid

Draceana Plantholder		 ×6 "Draconian." deco_plantholder_draceana

Xerographica Plantholder		 ×6 "How's it staying in there?" deco_plantholder_xerographica

Birdcage Plantholder		 ×6 "Hang in there." deco_plantholder_birdcage

Palm Plantholder		 ×6 "Add a little green to your room." deco_plantholder_palm

ZZ Plantholder		 ×6 "A touch of green." deco_plantholder_zz

Fernstand Plantholder		 ×6 "Fine fernishing." deco_plantholder_fernstand

Fern Plantholder		 ×6 "A hanging fern." deco_plantholder_fern

Terrarium Plantholder		 ×6 "Caged plants." deco_plantholder_terrarium

Plantpet Plantholder		 ×6 "Hardly needs watering." deco_plantholder_plantpet

Traps Plantholder		 ×6 "Watch your fingers." deco_plantholder_traps

Pitcher Plantholder		 ×6 "Eclectic ceilingware." deco_plantholder_pitchers
plainText:
Exclusive to:
Tab Icon.
The Plantholders Tab is a crafting category exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found under the Renovate Tab.
All Plantholders can be rotated in multiple directions.
Craftable Items and Structures[edit | edit source]
The following items and structures can be acquired in the Plantholders Tab:

Recipe
Description
Spawn Code

–Woodlegs, when examining a Pitcher Plantholder

–Wilba, when examining a Pitcher Plantholder
“Hanging around?”
–Wormwood, when examining a Pitcher Plantholder
“Those are pretty enough.”
–Wheeler, when examining a Pitcher Plantholder

title: Plantholders Tab
wikitext:
{{Exclusivity|Hamlet}} [[File:Plantholders.png|thumb|104x104px|Tab Icon.]] The '''Plantholders Tab''' is a crafting category exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It is found under the [[Renovate Tab]]. All Plantholders can be rotated in multiple directions. == Craftable Items and Structures == The following items and structures can be acquired in the Plantholders Tab: {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;" |- ! scope="col" style="text-align:center;" |Name ! scope="col" style="text-align:center;" |Recipe ! scope="col" style="text-align:center;" |Description ! scope="col" style="text-align:center;" |Spawn Code |- | [[File:Basic Plantholder.png|32px]]
